name: Sensec Holding AB (publ)
summary: Sensec Holding AB (publ), through its subsidiaries, supplies security control products. It sells, markets, educates, and performs technical services of security products, such as X-ray equipment, metal detectors, drug and explosive detectors, radiation detectors, electronic surveillance products, personal alarms, and security alarms, as well as camera surveillance equipment. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Arlandastad, Sweden.
